key_findings: Per-person limit: 300 CNY for all levels including D1 (06_business_entertainment.md Art 3). Per-event cap: 5000 CNY (Art 2). Both records pass individually.
Duplicate: same invoice reimbursed more than once = duplicate risk (01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Art 10).

Split: two-layer prohibition - general (01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Art 11) and entertainment-specific (06_business_entertainment.md Art 4). Combined 1085 CNY doesn't trigger Art 11 AR-02 threshold (3000 CNY), but Art 4 is absolute bar on same-visit splitting.
No entertainment-specific exemptions. Standard approval follows 03_authorization_management.md Annex 2.
All three policies active 2025 editions; 2022 policy repealed per Art 14 of 01.
unresolved_items: Whether R004239 and R004240 share the same invoice (duplicate risk per Article 10)
Whether R004239 and R004240 relate to the same customer visit (split risk per Article 4)
